STACKING META-LEARNER -- INDEPENDENT TEST SET EVALUATION

  modalities                          : ['OCT0', 'OCT1', 'OCTA3']
  feature_type                        : logit
  use_calib                           : True
  feature_col                         : logit_calib
  feature_cols_X                      : ['oct0_feat', 'oct1_feat', 'octa3_feat']

  threshold                           : 0.5
  ece_n_bins                          : 10

  best_folds                          : {'OCT0': 2, 'OCT1': 5, 'OCTA3': 1}
  test_eval_root                      : /data/Irene/SwinTransformer/Swin_Meta/VGG16_outputs/test_evaluation

  note                                : Independent test set -- never seen during base model training, validation, or meta-learner training.

[TEST SET COMPOSITION]
  Total    : 119
  Active   : 21  (17.6%)
  Inactive : 98  (82.4%)
  Imbalance: 4.67:1

[1. DISCRIMINATIVE PERFORMANCE  (threshold-independent)]
  AUROC : 0.8294
  AUPRC : 0.6143

  Balanced Accuracy   : 0.7211
  Sensitivity         : 0.6667

  PPV                 : 0.3889

  NPV  : 0.9157  <- rule-out safety

  Brier Score : 0.1536  (lower = better)

  True active              14               7
  True inactive            22              76

[REFERENCES]
  AUROC/AUPRC : Saito & Rehmsmeier, PLOS ONE 2015
    https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0118432
